hero.title1: Manage attendance, forms, leaves, and teams —
hero.subtitle: QR-based attendance tracking, dynamic forms and checklists, leave approvals, internal messaging, and branded compliance reports — unified in one multi-tenant platform with strict data isolation.

landing.positioning: Atsha is not another HR tool or a standalone attendance app. It's a complete multi-organization operations platform — where attendance, forms, leave management, internal communication, and compliance reporting all run in one place, with strict tenant isolation between every organization.

replaces.label: Before vs. After
replaces.title: Stop stitching tools together.
replaces.subtitle: Most operations teams cobble together five or more separate tools. Atsha replaces them all.

features.label: Platform Modules
features.title: Everything your operations team needs.
features.subtitle: Six core modules, all organization-aware, all running in one unified workspace.
features.f1Desc: Every organization gets isolated data, custom branding, departments, and domains. One platform, strict boundaries.
features.f2Desc: Generate time-limited QR codes per shift. Staff scan to clock in. No buddy-punching, no hardware.
features.f3Desc: Build checklists, inspection reports, and compliance forms. Staff submit, supervisors review and approve.
features.f4Desc: Employees request sick, vacation, or emergency leave. Supervisors approve in seconds from the dashboard.
features.f5Desc: Broadcast announcements and send direct messages. Everything stays inside the workspace — not in WhatsApp.
features.f6Desc: Export branded PDFs and compliance documents. Every report carries the organization's identity.

workflow.label: How It Works
workflow.title: From setup to daily operations in four steps.
workflow.subtitle: Get your entire organization running on Atsha in minutes, not months.
workflow.s1Desc: Register your company, set a unique slug, and configure your brand identity — display name, colors, support email, and custom domain.
workflow.s2Desc: Add your departments (Kitchen, Floor, Maintenance…), then invite team members by email with the right role and department assigned.
workflow.s3Title: Set up policies and feature flags
workflow.s3Desc: Enable QR attendance, configure token validity, set leave approval workflows, and toggle feature access per organization.
workflow.s4Desc: Your dashboard shows today's forms, attendance count, and pending leave requests. Quick actions let your team move through daily tasks in seconds.

problems.label: Why Atsha
problems.title: Real problems. Specific solutions.
problems.p1Desc: Daily inspection forms, closing checklists, and incident reports get lost, damaged, or ignored. No audit trail, no accountability.
problems.s1Desc: Build custom form templates. Staff submit digitally, supervisors approve with one click. Every submission is searchable, timestamped, and exportable.
problems.p2Desc: Traditional punch cards and web-based logins are trivially gamed. One employee clocks in for three.
problems.s2Title: QR codes that expire in seconds.
problems.s2Desc: A QR manager generates a time-limited code for each shift. Employees must scan in person — codes can't be shared, screenshotted, or reused.
problems.p3Desc: Policy updates get lost in group chats between memes and personal messages. No confirmation that anyone read them.
problems.s3Desc: Broadcast announcements to the entire organization or target specific departments. Messages stay inside the platform where work happens.
problems.p4Title: Every branch runs a different system.
problems.p4Desc: Franchise groups maintain separate servers, separate databases, and separate tools for each location. IT costs multiply with every new branch.
problems.s4Desc: Add a new organization in minutes. Each gets its own branding, staff, forms, attendance, and domains — sharing zero data with the others.

useCases.label: Use Cases
useCases.title: See Atsha in action.
useCases.subtitle: Real scenarios from real operations teams.
useCases.uc1Desc: 6:00 AM — The manager generates a morning QR code. 40 staff scan in as they arrive. By 11 PM, the closing checklist is submitted and approved — no paper touched, no follow-up needed.
useCases.uc2Desc: One Atsha instance runs all five brands. Each brand has its own domain, logo, employees, departments, and forms. Data never crosses brand boundaries. IT maintains one system.
useCases.uc3Desc: An employee opens the app, selects "Sick Leave", and submits a request. Their supervisor receives a notification, reviews it, and taps "Approve". Done in 30 seconds.
useCases.uc4Desc: A new hygiene policy goes out as a platform announcement. Staff confirm via a mandatory acknowledgment form. The officer exports a branded compliance PDF — timestamped and signed.

architecture.label: Architecture
architecture.title: Built for multi-organization control.
architecture.subtitle: Not a feature bolted on. Multi-tenancy is the foundation.
architecture.card1Desc: Every record — users, forms, attendance logs, leave requests, messages — carries an organization boundary. No cross-organization access at any layer.
architecture.card2Desc: Four scoped access levels with strict boundaries.
architecture.card3Desc: Custom domains, branded emails, branded PDFs, department structures, color schemes, and display names — all configurable per organization.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Common questions.
faq.q1: Can multiple organizations run on the same Atsha instance?
faq.a1: Yes. Atsha is built as a multi-tenant platform from the ground up. Each organization operates with fully isolated data, separate branding, independent departments, and dedicated domain settings — all on a single shared infrastructure.
faq.q2: Is data fully isolated between organizations?
faq.a2: Every record in the system — users, forms, attendance logs, leave requests, messages — carries an organization boundary. There is no cross-organization data access at any level, enforced at both the API and database layers.
faq.q3: How does QR attendance prevent time fraud?
faq.a3: Atsha generates time-limited, single-use QR codes that expire within seconds. Codes are managed by designated QR managers and can only be scanned on-site. No buddy-punching, no screenshots, no workarounds.
faq.q4: Can we customize branding per organization?
faq.a4: Absolutely. Each organization controls its own display name, logos, color scheme, email sender identity, PDF report branding, and custom domain. Your employees see your brand, not ours.
faq.q5: Does Atsha support Arabic and RTL layouts?
faq.a5: Yes. Atsha is fully internationalized with built-in Arabic and English support. The entire interface, including forms, reports, and emails, adapts to right-to-left layouts automatically.
faq.a6: Register your organization in under two minutes. Configure your departments, invite your team, and start running attendance, forms, and leave management immediately. No credit card required.

cta.subtitle: Attendance, forms, leave management, messaging, and compliance — unified across every organization you manage.
cta.support: Multi-tenant architecture · Role-based access · White-label branding · Full Arabic/RTL support

footer.tagline: Multi-organization operations and workforce management platform. Built for operations-heavy industries in the Middle East and beyond.
